# BE_JIT_WRITE_PROTECT_TAG

**Global Variable**

A discriminator value the system uses to generate pointer authentication codes for just-in-time compilation.

## Declaration

```swift
var BE_JIT_WRITE_PROTECT_TAG: Int { get }
```
